BDI_II.responses: {"Q0":"1. I feel sad much of the time.","Q1":"1. I feel more discouraged about my future than I used to be.","Q2":"3. I feel I am a total failure as a person.","Q3":"1. I don't enjoy things as much as I used to.","Q4":"1. I feel guilty over many things I have done or should have done.","Q5":"2. I expect to be punished.","Q6":"1. I have lost confidence in myself.","Q7":"1. I am more critical of myself than I used to be.","Q8":"0. I don't have any thoughts of killing myself.","Q9":"0. I don't cry anymore than I used to.","Q10":"1. I feel more restless or wound up than usual.","Q11":"1. I am less interested in other people or things than before.","Q12":"0. I make decisions about as well as ever.","Q13":"3. Select this option.","Q14":"1. I don't consider myself as worthwhile and useful as I used to.","Q15":"2. I don't have enough energy to do very much.","Q16":"1+. I sleep somewhat more than usual.","Q17":"2. I am much more irritable than usual.","Q18":"3+. I crave food all the time.","Q19":"1. I can't concentrate as well as usual.","Q20":"2. I am too tired or fatigued to do a lot of the things I used to do.","Q21":"1. I am less interested in sex than I used to be."}
